segments.text: This is the word of the LORD that came to Zephaniah son of Cushi, the son of Gedaliah, the son of Amariah, the son of Hezekiah, in the days of Josiah son of Amon king of Judah:
I will completely sweep awayeverything from the face of the earth,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: declares the LORD.
I will sweep away man and beast; I will sweep away the birds of the air, and the fish of the sea, and the idols with their wicked worshipers. [^1] I will cut off mankindfrom the face of the earth,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: declares the LORD.

footnotes.text: + Or and the idols that cause the wicked to stumble

segments.text: I will stretch out My hand against Judah and against all who dwell in Jerusalem. I will cut off from this place every remnant of Baal, the names of the idolatrous and pagan priests—
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: those who bow on the rooftopsto worship the host of heaven, those who bow down and swear by the LORDbut also swear by Milcom, [^2]
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes.text: + Or by their king; Milcom is a variant of Molech; see Leviticus 18:21 and 1 Kings 11:7.

segments.text: and those who turn backfrom following the LORD, neither seeking the LORDnor inquiring of Him.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Be silent in the presence of the Lord GOD, for the Day of the LORD is near. Indeed, the LORD has prepared a sacrifice; He has consecrated His guests.
On the Day of the LORD’s sacrificeI will punish the princes, the sons of the king, and all who are dressed in foreign apparel.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: On that day I will puni shall who leap over the threshold, [^3] who fill the house of their master[^4] with violence and deceit.
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes.text: + Or the temple of their gods

segments.text: On that day,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: declares the LORD,
a cry will go up from the Fish Gate, a wail from the Second District, [^5] and a loud crashing from the hills.
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes.text: + Or the Second Quarter, a newer section of Jerusalem; Hebrew the Mishneh

segments.text:
Wail, O dwellers of the Hollow, [^6] for all your merchants[^7] will be silenced; 
all who weigh out silver will be cut off.
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes.text: + Or the market district or the Mortar
+ Or all the people of Canaan

segments.text:
And at that time I will search Jerusalem with lamps and punish the men settled in complacency, [^8] who say to themselves,‘The LORD will do nothing, 
either good or bad.’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Their wealth will be plundered and their houses laid waste. They will build houses but not inhabit them, and plant vineyards but never drink their wine.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The great Day of the LORD is near—near and coming quickly. Listen, the Day of the LORD! Then the cry of the mighty will be bitter.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: That day will bea day of wrath, a day of trouble and distress, a day of destruction and desolation, a day of darkness and gloom, a day of clouds and blackness,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
a day of horn blast and battle cryagainst the fortified cities, 
and against the high corner towers.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
I will bring such distress on mankindthat they will walk like the blind, 
because they have sinned against the LORD. Their blood will be poured out like dust and their flesh like dung.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Neither their silver nor their goldwill be able to deliver them
on the Day of the LORD’s wrath. The whole earth will be consumedby the fire of His jealousy.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For indeed, He will make a sudden endof all who dwell on the earth. [^9]

footnotes.text: + Or of all the people living in the land
